final:
// // This module implements an XOR gate instead of the specified logic gate
module logic_gate (
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output X
);

    assign X = (A & B) | (~C & D) | (E ^ F) | (~G & H);

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an XOR gate instead of the specified logic gate
